---
title: "Jie Geng"
image: "files/profile_pic.PNG"
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jigeng@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jie-geng-901bb1378/
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: Resume
      href: resume.qmd
    - icon: folder
      text: Projects
      href: projects.qmd
---

## Welcome

MS in Business Analytics, **UC San Diego**

I am a graduate student in Business Analytics at UC San Diego with interests in data analysis, business strategy, and decision-making through data-driven insights. This website presents my academic background, selected projects, and coursework completed for MGTA 495.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
I am especially interested in applying analytics to solve real business problems in marketing, operations, and strategy.
:::

::: {.highlights-section}
## Highlights

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="33%"}
### Projects
I have worked on projects involving data analysis, business problem solving, and applied modeling. Visit the Projects page to see examples of my work.
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### Coursework
My coursework at UC San Diego has strengthened my foundation in analytics, statistics, and business decision-making.
:::
:::
:::

## Quick Facts

**Program:** MS in Business Analytics

**University:** UC San Diego

**Focus Areas:** Data analytics, business insights, decision-making

**Website Purpose:** Resume, projects, and MGTA 495 coursework

## Explore More

<div class="homepage-buttons">
  <a href="resume.qmd" class="custom-button">View Resume</a>
  <a href="projects.qmd" class="custom-button">View Projects</a>
  <a href="mailto:jigeng@ucsd.edu" class="custom-button">Contact Me</a>
</div>
